Drops off of "necro neophyte," or whatever they are, in Befallen. Well, I'd assume only humans anyway, although it does say here that this drops off of a dog.

this is dropped by the Thugs, Smugglers and Ring Leaders in qeynos Aquaducts. Received 20 of these in less than 2 hours of killing them with my rogue

It's used for brewing

blood temper:
